name: SQL Server Observability
author: OpsDB Platform
description: Monitor Microsoft SQL Server instances including wait statistics, blocking queries, missing indexes, tempdb health, and log file usage.

sqlserver.db_stats.description: Online database count, read-only and standby state counts.
sqlserver.db_stats.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_dbs, SUM(CAST(is_read_only AS INT)) AS readonly_dbs, SUM(CAST(is_in_standby AS INT)) AS standby_dbs FROM sys.databases WHERE state_desc = 'ONLINE'

sqlserver.wait_stats.description: Average wait time and total waiting tasks from sys.dm_os_wait_stats.
sqlserver.wait_stats.query: SELECT SUM(wait_time_ms) / NULLIF(SUM(waiting_tasks_count), 0) AS avg_wait_time_ms, SUM(waiting_tasks_count) AS total_waiting_tasks FROM sys.dm_os_wait_stats WHERE wait_type NOT IN ('SLEEP_TASK','BROKER_TO_FLUSH','BROKER_TASK_STOP','CLR_AUTO_EVENT','REQUEST_FOR_DEADLOCK_SEARCH','RESOURCE_QUEUE','SERVER_IDLE_CHECK','SLEEP_DBSTARTUP','SLEEP_DBRECOVER','SLEEP_DBTASK','SLEEP_TEMPDBSTARTUP','SNI_HTTP_ACCEPT','SP_SERVER_DIAGNOSTICS_SLEEP','WAITFOR','XE_DISPATCHER_WAIT','XE_TIMER_EVENT')

sqlserver.missing_indexes.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS missing_index_count FROM sys.dm_db_missing_index_details

sqlserver_wait_time_high.title: SQL Server Wait Time High
sqlserver_wait_time_high.recommendation: Investigate top wait types, review index fragmentation, and check for blocking queries.

sqlserver_missing_index_count_high.title: Missing Index Count High
sqlserver_missing_index_count_high.recommendation: Review missing index DMVs and evaluate adding recommended indexes for high-impact queries.

sqlserver_log_file_size_high.title: Log File Size High
sqlserver_log_file_size_high.recommendation: Check log backup frequency, identify long-running transactions, and review recovery model.
